headers.value: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self'; connect-src 'self' https://*.googleapis.com https://*.firebaseio.com https://firebaseinstallations.googleapis.com https://firestore.googleapis.com https://identitytoolkit.googleapis.com https://securetoken.googleapis.com https://www.googleapis.com; img-src 'self' data: https://www.gstatic.com https://lh3.googleusercontent.com; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; font-src 'self' data:; frame-src https://accounts.google.com https://*.firebaseapp.com; object-src 'none'; base-uri 'self'; form-action 'self' https://accounts.google.com; frame-ancestors 'none'; upgrade-insecure-requests
